positive: A highly stylized, geometric illustration of a stylized mountain landscape at sunrise. The scene should feature abstract, interconnected peaks and valleys rendered in contrasting jewel tones (deep sapphire, emerald green, and vibrant gold accents). The foreground includes stylized flora and fauna (e.g., abstract geometric deer silhouettes, stylized sunburst mandalas). Composition should be symmetrical, centered, and ready for apparel printing. The art style should mimic sophisticated woodcut engraving meets modern psychedelic minimalism. Crisp line work, strong silhouette definition, flat color blocking, high contrast, designed for maximum visual pop on fabric.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, ugly, messy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, dirty, realistic photo
